2026-04-06 17:07:34,214 INFO sqlalchemy.engine.Engine 
CREATE TABLE benchmark_scores (
	id UUID NOT NULL, 
	user_id UUID NOT NULL, 
	job_id UUID, 
	score SMALLINT NOT NULL, 
	peer_group_size INTEGER, 
	seniority_level VARCHAR(20), 
	niche VARCHAR(100), 
	missing_skills JSONB, 
	recommended_keywords JSONB, 
	calculated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL, 
	PRIMARY KEY (id), 
	CONSTRAINT ck_benchmark_score_range CHECK (score BETWEEN 0 AND 100), 
	FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, 
	FOREIGN KEY(job_id) REFERENCES scraped_jobs (id) ON DELETE SET NULL
)

CREATE TABLE user_jobs (
	id UUID NOT NULL, 
	user_id UUID NOT NULL, 
	job_id UUID NOT NULL, 
	match_score SMALLINT, 
	status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, 
	optimized_cv JSONB, 
	cover_letter TEXT, 
	interview_prep JSONB, 
	applied_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, 
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL, 
	updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL, 
	PRIMARY KEY (id), 
	CONSTRAINT uq_user_job UNIQUE (user_id, job_id), 
	CONSTRAINT ck_userjob_match_score CHECK (match_score BETWEEN 0 AND 100), 
	CONSTRAINT ck_userjob_status CHECK (status IN ('new', 'applied', 'saved', 'hidden', 'duplicate')), 
	FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, 
	FOREIGN KEY(job_id) REFERENCES scraped_jobs (id) ON DELETE CASCADE
)
